privileged_info_for_vlm: Floreant POS 1.4 build 1707b is used. Back Office PIN is 1111. The agent must update three existing items: HAMMER COFFEE to $3.75 (from $2.00), SMK HOUS B FAST to $10.50 (from $7.99), and OLD TIMER B FAST to $9.75 (from $6.99). The agent must also create a new category 'PREMIUM SELECTIONS' and add three new items to it: WAGYU BEEF BURGER ($24.95), TRUFFLE FRIES ($12.95), and ARTISAN CHEESE PLATE ($18.50).
